title: Taq PCR (Protocol for ZymoTaq™ PreMix)
author: Alba Balletbó

steps_raw.instruction: Add all components in a 250 μL tube making up to a 25 or 50 μl reaction. If performing various PCR with different templates, a Master Mix is recommended to be done. %s %s
Gently mix the PCR reactions and transfer the tubes to a thermocycler. Thermocycling conditions for a routine PCR: %s %s
